productDisplayName: Q&Q Attractive Men Silver Dial Watch
description: Case Style: Analog watch with a stainless steel round case, has a fixed bezel Dial Style: Silver dial with a tachymeter inside, branding on the dial, white and dark blue coloured hands and silver coloured hour marks Features: Screw to reset time, date aperture at 4 hour mark Strap Style: Black coloured strap with a tang clasp and holes to customise fit Water resistant up to 10 BAR Warranty: 1 year
